title: MapRender

# Map Render
A serverside mod implementing Doom from the ground up (WIP)

## How to use:
1. Give yourself the `maprender:item` item
2. Place it on the ground
3. Enter the minecart that conveniently spawned
4. Use your movement keys to move

    4.1. Forward and Backward move the camera forward and backward, left and right turn the camera left and right
